programmes.show_description: Action with Lewis Collins. A British SAS trooper goes undercover to thwart a terrorist plot targeting American dignitaries. Also starring Richard Widmark and Judy Davis (1982).
How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Action with Lewis Collins. A British SAS trooper goes undercover to thwart a terrorist plot targeting American dignitaries. Also starring Richard Widmark and Judy Davis (1982).
Red-hot action adventure with Rachel Hunter. Can a volcano expert blow the whistle on an illegal oil drilling operation before it sets off a city-destroying super-volcano beneath Miami? (2011)
Brutal western with Lee Van Cleef and John Phillip Law. Fifteen years after his family were massacred by bandits, a young boy is now a skilled gunslinger - and he's hell-bent on revenge...(1967)
Join officers from New Zealand Police as they patrol the streets and race to the scene of real-life emergency calls.

Steed and Tara investigate when national security is compromised by a foreign agent who has devised ingenious methods of extracting top secret information out of British agents.
Knocked out in pursuit of a rogue agent, Steed awakes to the sight of a deserted London under the control of an embittered Brigadier with explosive plans.
Buck Cannon goes to work as a foreman for a lovely neighbouring widow, and clashes with his brother John when the job appears permanent.
High-stakes western with Shelley Winters and Joel McCrea. Fifteen years after they made her an orphan, can casino queen Frenchie Fontaine finally make her dad's killers pay for their crimes? (1950)

An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
A neer-do-well seeks to fake his own death so his fiancée arriving from London doesn't discover he is a failure.
A Rancher returns from Denver with his young bride and is baited into a gunfight by notorious gunslinger Vince Sanders.
When Billy Blue Cannon is forced into a showdown with wanted gunfighters, he is saved by a wandering dentist who proves to be fast with a gun.
Danny becomes an assassination target after accidentally exposing Count Marceau as a Nazi. At the same time Suzy tries to clear the name of her late father.
Steed and Tara investigate an unlikely suspect who is suddenly attracting the romantic affections of seasoned bureaucrats who are too keen to share their top secret information with her.
Steed and Tara are tasked with tracking a briefcase that is being passed around between enemy agents. Will the case expose a national security risk at the heart of government?
In an apocalyptic future where fire-breathing dragons have torched the planet, one man leads a band of survivors in a final stand against the beasts. Stars Christian Bale, Matthew McConaughey. (2002)

A gang led by Morgan Travis is planning to steal the Crown Jewels and replace Mannering with his exact double.

Tense action thriller starring Ray Winstone. A Boer War survivor is hired to track down a fugitive on the run. What should be a simple job, turns into a gripping game of cat and mouse. (2011)

A female criminal must return for trial after the miner she robbed dies.
Buck, Victoria and Manolito return to Montoya Ranch and become prisoners, with Don Sebastian, of a degraded former Civil War friend of Buck.
An old friend of Danny's, Angie, turns out to be a hit man. Brett warns Danny but he champions Angie - leading to a showdown which only one of them can survive.
Steed returns from holiday unable to remember anything from the past three weeks. Can Steed be stopped before he carries out his sudden urge to kill 'Mother'?
Steed joins the Jack The Ripper Club to investigate a series of murders. Can he and Tara unearth why the killer is targeting delegates attending an International conference?
